content.en:
Void territory.

The Five Thunder Domain Ancestor and the Bloodstain Domain Ancestor began to fight, and the battle of the Invincible Domain Ancestor would be very terrifying, but in the Void Territory, the fluctuations were bound within a range.

I saw that the Bloodstain Domain Ancestor turned into countless blood-colored figures, this is a special combat incarnation, but it can't exist for a long time, it can be used in battle, but it is very terrifying, if the same level has no way to deal with it, it will be killed in an instant.

"This is the Blood Shadow Domain Ancestor's famous holy skill, Blood Shadow, it is his own holy skill, and no one else can learn it!"

Someone discussed.

In the face of the Blood Shadow Saint Technique, the other two-step Invincible Domain Ancestors would be very dignified, but the Five Thunder Domain Ancestors smiled lightly, clasped their hands together, and their entire body began to grow larger, turning into an earth-shattering Thunder Body.

Countless blood shadows bombarded the thunder body of the Five Thunder Domain Ancestors, but countless blood shadows were annihilated by the thunder power of the thunder body, but the thunder body was not shattered.

"No, this is not the Thunder Pole Holy Body, the Thunder Pole Holy Body is not so powerful!"

The Bloodstained Domain Ancestor was stunned.

Soon, he saw a clue.

"Your Thunder Pole Holy Body has broken the limit?"

The Bloodstain Domain Ancestor said solemnly.

If you break the limit of the Holy Body, the Holy Body will transform step by step towards the ancestral body.

This is just like the Holy Skill, once the Holy Skill breaks the limit, it will transform into an Ancestral Skill.

The same is true of the Eucharist!

However, it is more difficult for the Holy Body to transform into an ancestral body, and even if it breaks the limit, it is impossible to transform into an ancestral body all at once.

At this time, the Five Thunder Domain Ancestor smiled and said, "Blood Stain Domain Ancestor, my Holy Body is far from reaching the Ancestral Body Realm, but I already have a trace of the characteristics of the Ancestral Body, that is, the realm of the Half-Step Ancestral Body!

"Half-step Ancestral Body, yes, I am indeed not your opponent, you should have reached the combat power of a one-step invincible domain ancestor, I am not an opponent!"

The Bloodstained Domain Ancestor directly admitted defeat.

In fact, he was only a two-step invincible domain ancestor's combat power, although he was infinitely close to a one-step invincible domain ancestor, but it was not a one-step invincible domain ancestor.

The Bloodstained Domain Ancestor admits defeat, which means that the Bloodstained Domain Ancestor will not care.

"Anyone else wants to compete?"

The Five Thunder Domain Ancestor asked.

"I'll do it!"

The Mo Evil Domain Ancestor of the Firmament Holy Gate spoke.

"Mo Evil Domain Ancestor, then please!"

The Five Thunder Domain Ancestor said indifferently.

The Mo Evil Domain Ancestor flew into the Void Territory and began to fight with the Five Thunder Domain Ancestors.

I saw that the Mo Evil Domain Ancestor was holding a black long sword, this was his top holy soldier, the Mo Evil Sword, which he specially asked a peerless Domain Ancestor to create, and the power was very terrifying, comparable to the top 100 weapon holy relics on the holy relics list.

"Ten Thousand Swords !!"

Countless sword lights slashed towards the Five Thunder Domain Ancestors, and each sword light contained terrifying power.

"One step invincible domain ancestor!"

Many Invincible Domain Ancestors were surprised, it had been rumored that the Mo Evil Domain Ancestor was only a two-step Invincible Domain Ancestor, but now the strength he showed had reached a one-step Invincible Domain Ancestor, and it was not an ordinary one-step Invincible Domain Ancestor, I am afraid that he had already been promoted to a one-step Invincible Domain Ancestor.

"It's so hidden!"

Many Invincible Domain Ancestors secretly said.

At this time, the Five Thunder Domain Ancestor did not sit still, but also performed his own holy technique, the Five Thunder Seal!

Rumble!!!!!

Five thunder seals appeared, blasting towards the countless sword lights of the Mo Evil Domain Ancestor.

Suddenly, the Five Thunder Seals and the Ten Thousand Swords Saint Technique of the Mo Evil Domain Ancestor collided together, and they all collided and were annihilated.

I saw that the sword qi of the Mo Evil Domain Ancestor was completely annihilated, and there was still one of the Five Thunder Domain Ancestor's Five Thunder Seals left, and this Five Thunder Seal pierced through time and space, blasting into the body of the Mo Evil Domain Ancestor, instantly hitting the Mo Evil Domain Ancestor.

The Invincible Domain Ancestors really had to fight to the death, even if it would take a long time.

Therefore, the Mo Evil Domain Ancestor would not cheat, and he had to distinguish between life and death.

At this moment, he was injured, and his strongest attack could not be compared to the Five Thunder Domain Ancestor, which was already a loss.

"I throw in the towel!"

Mo Evil Domain Ancestor admits defeat.

"Anyone else?"

The Five Thunder Domain Ancestor asked.

Many invincible domain ancestors stopped talking, most of them were two-step invincible domain ancestors, but there were also one-step invincible domain ancestors, but they thought that their strength was not as good as the five thunder domain ancestors, and if they were forced to play, they would not only lose, but also expose their strength, which was completely unnecessary.

Just as everyone was about to give up, an invincible domain ancestor spoke.

"Five Thunder Domain Ancestors, let me challenge you!"

Everyone forgot about it, but they saw that it was an invincible domain ancestor from the Immortal Holy Gate, the Ancient Heng Domain Ancestor!

Gu Heng Domain Ancestor is very low-key, but he doesn't know his specific strength.

At this time, the Gu Heng Domain Ancestor dared to challenge the Five Thunder Domain Ancestors, and its strength had definitely reached the combat power of the invincible Domain Ancestor in one step.

"Gu Heng Domain Ancestor, let's make a move!"

The Five Thunder Domain Ancestors still didn't panic.

Gu Heng Domain Ancestor entered the Void Territory, and the aura on his body began to spread.

Thundered!!!!!

The incomparably ancient and powerful aura suppressed the eternals, far surpassing the momentum of the two-step invincible domain ancestor.

Moreover, the physique of the Ancient Heng Domain Ancestor was unexpectedly full of supreme majesty, this was not an invincible domain body.

"You've broken the limits of the domain!"

The Five Thunder Domain Ancestors were surprised.

"Yes, I have broken the progress of the domain body, and I am transforming towards the supreme domain body, and the shackles of the invincible domain ancestor and the supreme domain ancestor can no longer hinder me. If the Invincible Domain Ancestor wants to transform into the Supreme Domain Ancestor, it needs to go through nine transformations, and I have already completed three transformations. You should know what the three transformations represent, although I haven't surpassed the scope of one step of the invincible domain ancestor, but it is vaguely beyond the combat power of the one step of the invincible domain ancestor, if you only have the strength just now, I'm afraid you won't be able to beat me!"

Ancient Hengyu Ancestral Dao.

"Congratulations to the Ancient Heng Domain Ancestor, it seems that your Immortal Holy Gate is about to give birth to a Peerless Domain Ancestor again!"

The Five Thunder Domain Ancestors congratulated.

"Congratulations to the Ancient Heng Domain Ancestor!"

"Congratulations to the Ancient Heng Domain Ancestor!"

"Congratulations to the Ancient Heng Domain Ancestor!"

One Invincible Domain Ancestor congratulated, his tone full of envy.

In the Dark Sacred Domain, there are many invincible domain ancestors whose strength is stronger than the ancient Heng Domain Ancestor, and there are even demons who surpass the combat power of the invincible domain ancestor by one step, but so what, as long as the limit of the invincible domain body cannot be broken, then there is no way to be promoted to the invincible domain ancestor.

The Invincible Domain Ancestor is almost the limit of the Domain Ancestor, and the Invincible Domain Body is almost unable to break the shackles under normal circumstances, which is why there are so few Superior Domain Ancestors.

The Holy Gate also had no good way to help the Invincible Domain Ancestor cultivate into the Supreme Domain Body, everything depended on chance, or endless years.

It can be said that no invincible domain ancestor has 100% certainty of impacting the realm of the peerless domain ancestor, and can only rely on a certain amount of luck.

And now, the Ancient Heng Domain Ancestor has broken the shackles and cultivated step by step, and he can impact the Supreme Domain Ancestor realm.

At this time, many Invincible Domain Ancestors looked at the Five Thunder Domain Ancestors, wondering if the Five Thunder Domain Ancestors would know each other.

However, the Five Thunder Domain Ancestors did not panic at all, and instead smiled.

Obviously, the Five Thunder Domain Ancestors still had full confidence in themselves.
